title: Bow Charger 32x
description: Add bands of color to the Faithful 32x bows based on draw distance!
body:
Inspired by https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/bow-charger, but recreated for [Faithful-32x](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/faithful-32x).

This takes the Faithful-32x bow textures and adds bands of color that change based on the bow's state.
